meta.title: httping.io — HTTP Ping & Diagnostics Tool
meta.description: Instantly check HTTP status, response time, TTFB, redirect chains and TLS certificate for any URL. Free online HTTP diagnostic tool for developers.

hero.title: HTTP Ping
hero.subtitle: Instantly inspect any URL — status code, response time, TTFB, redirect chain, TLS certificate and response headers. Like ping, but for HTTP.

errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)
errors.fetchFailed: Failed to reach the URL. The server may be unreachable.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

statusCodes.title: HTTP Status Codes
statusCodes.subtitle: Quick reference for every HTTP status code.

footer.tagline: Built for developers who care about reliability.
